en_title: 'Wrong (again)' — Infinity Ward Fires Back at Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Gunny AI Chatbot Claim
cn_title: Infinity Ward回击《使命召唤：现代战争4》Gunny AI聊天机器人质疑
subtitle: 配枪争议
opus_summary: Infinity Ward否认《使命召唤：现代战争4》的配枪助手Gunny是AI聊天机器人，称其推荐方案均由开发团队手工调校。工作室还借「又错了」回击泄密者TheGhostOfHope，双方积怨再度公开化。

paragraphs.en: Infinity Ward has hit back at claims the new Gunsmith for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 features an AI chatbot.
paragraphs.cn: Infinity Ward回击了有关《使命召唤：现代战争4》新版枪匠系统内置AI聊天机器人的说法。

paragraphs.en: Modern Warfare 4's Gunsmith includes Gunny, a new feature designed to help players quickly create builds based on their playstyle and unlocked attachments. Infinity Ward has said it features weapon builds developed by the studio's Weapons Team, and can instantly configure close-, mid-, or long-range builds tailored to different approaches to combat. In a blog post , Activision said Gunny “brings a Gunnery Sergeant’s eye to weapon customization.”
paragraphs.cn: 《现代战争4》的枪匠系统加入了名为Gunny的新功能，可根据玩家的游玩风格和已解锁配件快速生成配枪方案。Infinity Ward表示，其中的武器方案由工作室武器团队设计，能针对不同战斗方式立即配置近距离、中距离或远距离配装。动视在一篇博客中称，Gunny「以炮兵军士的专业眼光审视武器定制」。

paragraphs.en: The new feature hit the headlines after a screenshot of Modern Warfare 4 showing the new Gunsmith user interface went viral on social media . In the image, we see Gunny "speak" to the player via text reminiscent of the kind of dialogue we’re now used to seeing from the likes of ChatGPT.
paragraphs.cn: 一张展示《现代战争4》新版枪匠界面的截图在社交媒体走红后，这项新功能登上了新闻头条。图中Gunny通过文字与玩家「交谈」，其对话形式很像人们如今熟悉的ChatGPT等工具。

paragraphs.en: “Hello, I can help you build a weapon when you have more attachments unlocked,” Gunny says. “Keep leveling your weapon.” You can press RT to access Gunny from Gunsmith.
paragraphs.cn: Gunny写道：「你好，等你解锁更多配件后，我可以帮你组装武器。继续提升武器等级吧。」玩家可在枪匠界面按RT键打开Gunny。

paragraphs.en: Fans picked up on this immediately and expressed concern, with some joking it that Gunny was Call of Duty’s take on Microsoft's animated paperclip assistant, Clippy. “Genuinely what’s one upside to having an AI help build your gun,” asked one fan. “Some responses were particularly aggressive. “If you’re allowed to chat with Gunny, I’m exclusively telling it to shoot itself in the face,” one person said. “You cannot go literally anywhere in the digital world without these assholes shoving this useless s**t down our throats.”
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝很快注意到这一点并表达担忧，有人开玩笑说Gunny是《使命召唤》版的微软动画回形针助手Clippy。一名粉丝问道：「让AI帮你配枪究竟有什么好处？」部分回应尤其激烈。有人说：「如果能跟Gunny聊天，我只会叫它朝自己脸上开枪。如今在数字世界里，你简直走到哪儿都会碰上这帮混蛋把这种没用的破玩意儿硬塞给你。」

paragraphs.en: Infinity Ward stepped in when former Call of Duty leaker TheGhostOfHope joined the complaints in a post on X / Twitter : “They got an AI chatbot in the game now to help mfs with their loadouts as if it’s not the same s**t used every year.”
paragraphs.cn: 前《使命召唤》泄密者TheGhostOfHope也在X发帖加入批评后，Infinity Ward出面回应。TheGhostOfHope写道：「他们现在往游戏里塞了个AI聊天机器人，帮这些家伙配装备，好像每年用的不是同一套东西似的。」

paragraphs.en: That, it seems, was enough to spark Infinity Ward into action. In a reply , the developer insisted Gunny offers developer-tuned setups for quick loadout swaps between matches.
paragraphs.cn: 这番话似乎足以让Infinity Ward采取行动。开发商在回复中坚称，Gunny提供的是由开发人员调校的方案，方便玩家在比赛间隙快速更换配装。

paragraphs.en: “Gunny is hand crafted by our developers, not AI. It recommends builds based on the attachments you’ve unlocked for each weapon. It helps make quick loadout changes between matches.
paragraphs.cn: 「Gunny由我们的开发人员手工打造，并非AI。它会根据你为每把武器解锁的配件推荐方案，帮助你在比赛间隙快速调整配装。」

paragraphs.en: As you can probably gather by Infinity Ward’s “wrong (again),” response, there’s a bit of needle between Activision and TheGhostOfHope. TheGhostOfHope is well known in the Call of Duty community for leaks, some of which Activision has called out as wrong in the past. For example, in February, TheGhostOfHope claimed that “sources” had indicated that Activision planned to launch a standalone Zombies game. That claim prompted an official response from the Call of Duty account , which poured cold water on the “leak.” “The rumor factory working overtime. This ain’t it,” the account said .
paragraphs.cn: 从Infinity Ward那句「又错了」不难看出，动视与TheGhostOfHope之间颇有嫌隙。TheGhostOfHope因爆料而在《使命召唤》社区广为人知，其中一些内容过去曾被动视点名否认。例如今年2月，TheGhostOfHope声称有「消息人士」透露动视计划推出独立的僵尸模式游戏。《使命召唤》官方账号随后出面给这则「爆料」泼冷水，称：「谣言工厂又在加班了。不是这回事。」

paragraphs.en: Then, in March, Activision demanded TheGhostOfHope stop releasing confidential information about the series , insisting that even when leaks are wrong they cause problems. TheGhostOfHope agreed, although has continued to comment on Call of Duty generally.
paragraphs.cn: 到了3月，动视要求TheGhostOfHope停止发布该系列的机密信息，并强调泄密内容即便有误也会造成麻烦。TheGhostOfHope同意了这一要求，但此后仍继续就《使命召唤》发表一般性评论。

paragraphs.en: While Gunny may not be an AI chatbot exactly, Activision has come under fire in the past for its use of AI in the Call of Duty series. The games company used generative AI to build in-game assets for both Black Ops 6 and 7, and was called out by fans for Black Ops 6’s infamous six-fingered zombie Santa .
paragraphs.cn: 尽管严格来说Gunny可能并不是AI聊天机器人，但动视过去确实曾因在《使命召唤》系列中使用AI而遭到批评。该公司曾利用生成式AI制作《黑色行动6》和《黑色行动7》的游戏资产，其中《黑色行动6》那位臭名昭著的六指僵尸圣诞老人就引发了粉丝质疑。

paragraphs.en: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 launches across Xbox Series X and S, PlayStation 5 and PC via Battle.net, Xbox on PC, Steam, and Nintendo Switch 2 on Friday, October 23, 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤：现代战争4》将于2026年10月23日星期五发售，登陆XBOX Series、PlayStation 5、PC（Battle.net、PC版XBOX及Steam）和任天堂Nintendo Switch 2。
